name: Milvus
description: High-performance open-source vector database with REST API, gRPC, and an official MCP server. Stores billions of vectors for semantic search, RAG, and agent memory.

skills.name: Vector Similarity Search
skills.description: Search billions of vectors by cosine, inner product, or L2 distance with millisecond latency at scale.

skills.name: Hybrid Search
skills.description: Combine dense vector search with sparse keyword retrieval for accurate RAG pipeline retrieval results.

skills.name: MCP Integration
skills.description: Query and manage Milvus collections from any MCP client via the official zilliztech MCP server.
